violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must register with Rhode Island. Application provided to establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Sink & Surface cleaner solution was observed in excess of 1875 parts per million (ppm). A Sink & Surface sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 704-1875 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
An ice scoop was observed in poor repair. PIC voluntarily disposed of scoop at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The plumbing under a sink located in the bar area was in poor repair (leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
